name: Khumi Chin

ancestors.notes: Descent per Glottolog classification of Khumi Chin (khum1248).

notes: Skeleton. Khumi Chin is a Kuki-Chin (Sino-Tibetan) language of the Chin Hills and Bangladesh, written in a Latin-based orthography. Base Latin consonants and vowels plus digraphs ch/sh/ng/ny, aspirates kh/ph/th and the voiceless lateral hl are mapped. Lexical tone is not recovered by the romanization and is left unencoded, so an elevated PER floor is expected.

sources.author: Hammarström, H. et al. (Glottolog 5.0)
sources.title: Glottolog: Khumi Chin (khum1248)
sources.publisher: Max Planck Institute for Evolutionary Anthropology
